WILDHARVEST.Title: Wildharvest
WILDHARVEST.Controls.Title: Wildharvest
WILDHARVEST.Setting.Locations.Name: Location configuration
WILDHARVEST.Setting.Locations.Hint: Raw JSON that defines locations and Wildharvest activities.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.LootPools.Name: Loot pool configuration
WILDHARVEST.Setting.LootPools.Hint: Raw JSON that defines named loot pools and the compendiums inside them.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RandomLootPack.Name: Fallback random loot compendium pool
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RandomLootPack.Hint: Optional fallback item compendium pool used when a location or activity has no `lootPoolId`.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.Rules.Name: Loot rule configuration
WILDHARVEST.Setting.Rules.Hint: Stored JSON for the loot point thresholds and rarity rules used by the module.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.DataVersion.Name: Wildharvest data version
WILDHARVEST.Setting.DataVersion.Hint: Internal data schema version used for safe migrations.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.SearchSessions.Name: Wildharvest search sessions
WILDHARVEST.Setting.MigrationBackups.Hin: Automatic data snapshots created before module migrations.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.Name: Wildharvest loot rules
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.Label: Configure rules
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.Hint: Choose the active loot engine and configure how roll totals become Loot Points.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.ActiveMode: Rarity uses the original weighted rules. GP value builds a mixed item set whose combined price matches the configured target.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.PlayerRoll: Choose which roll adjustments players may request. The active GM validates these rules before resolving every search.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.AllowExtra: Allow players to enter an extra modifier
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.AllowRollM: Allow players to choose advantage or disadvantage
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.PointsHint: Each row defines the minimum total roll needed to grant the listed number of Loot Points.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.RarityHint: Set the point cost, rarity weight, and quantity formula used when this rarity is selected.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.RulesMenu.ValueHint: For each Loot Point amount, set the target combined value of all drawn items. Prices in PP, GP, EP, SP, and CP are converted automatically.
WILDHARVEST.Setting.Language.Name: Module language
WILDHARVEST.Setting.Language.Hint: Choose whether Wildharvest follows Foundry language automatically or always uses English or Polish.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Search.Title: Wildharvest: search
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Search.ActorHint: If you choose a character, rewards are added to their inventory. If the system blocks that, the module keeps a fallback record.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Search.LootDestinatio: Choose where rewards from this search should be stored.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Search.ExtraModifierL: The GM has locked extra modifiers for player searches.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Search.RollModeLocked: The GM has locked player searches to normal rolls.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Search.PossibleFindsH: Rewards are generated from the active compendium pool using the Loot Points rules.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Search.SkillModifierH: Auto-filled from the selected character's {skillLabel} modifier in D&D 5e. You can still adjust it before rolling.
Enter a manual modifier if needed.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Resources.Title: Wildharvest: logs
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Logs.ClearPrompt: Clear all stored logs for {actorName}? This cannot be undone.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.Title: Wildharvest: location configuration
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.Description: Create search options here. Each option stores its own skill and attached compendium pool, so the GM can prepare entries such as Fishing, Herbs, or Foraging in one place.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.LocationsHint: Define locations here. You can add `lootPoolId` at the location level or on a specific activity.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.ActivitiesHint: Create search options here, such as Fishing or Herb Wildharvest. Each option stores its own skill and attached compendiums.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.ResetActivityS: Replace the current staged search options with the sample set? Any unsaved changes in this window will be overwritten.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.ValidationHint: Review the staged search options before saving or exporting. Missing skill links or compendiums will be flagged here.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.ValidationAllG: All staged search options currently pass validation.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.LootPoolsHint: Create reusable loot sets here. Give the pool a name such as Fishing, then attach one or more item compendiums to it.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Config.NoLootPools: No loot pools are defined yet.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Compendiums.Title: Wildharvest: item compendiums
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Compendiums.Descripti: Browse item compendiums here. You can use their pack IDs in `lootPoolsJson`, and optionally save a fallback pool for locations or activities that do not define a `lootPoolId`.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Compendiums.LootPoolJ: Use `packIds` to connect one named pool to one or more item compendiums.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Compendiums.LootPoint: The total check result is converted into Loot Points before any item is drawn.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Compendiums.RarityCos: The module buys rarity from the Loot Points budget, then draws actual items from the selected compendium pool.

Common: 1
Uncommon: 2
Rare: 4
Very Rare: 6
Legendary: 10
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.LootPools.Title: Wildharvest: manage loot pools
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.LootPools.Description: Create named loot sets here. Example: make a pool called Fishing and attach a fish compendium to it.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.LootPools.Empty: No loot pools are staged in this configuration yet.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.LootPoolEditor.Name: Pool name
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.LootPoolEditor.NameHi: Use a simple name such as Forest, Fishing, Hunting, or Herbs.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.LootPoolEditor.Compen: Pick one or more item compendiums that should feed this loot pool.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Activities.Title: Wildharvest: manage search options
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Activities.Descriptio: Create the search options that the GM can later send to players, such as Fishing, Foraging, Hunting, or Herbs.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Activities.Empty: No search options are staged in this configuration yet.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ActivityEditor.Name: Option name
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ActivityEditor.NameHi: Examples: Fishing, Foraging, Berry Picking, River Search.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ActivityEditor.SkillH: Choose which D&D 5e skill the player should roll for this option.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ActivityEditor.Descri: This short description is shown to the player in the Wildharvest invitation preview.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ActivityEditor.Compen: Choose which item compendiums this option should draw loot from.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.Title: Wildharvest Control Panel
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.Descript: Prepare, send and track Wildharvest scenes from one place.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.LaunchHi: Choose a preset, set the scene details, then send the request to players.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.LiveResp: Watch the newest Wildharvest scene update in real time while you prepare the next one.
No Wildharvest scene has been sent yet.
No player responses match the current filter.
{count} more responses are available in the full view.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.ActiveSc: No Wildharvest scene is currently active.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.PreviewR: Sample rewards generated from the current compendium pool and Loot Points rules.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.PresetNe: This preset needs attention before it can be used.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.PreviewR: Total {total} / target {target} GP (±{tolerance}%); excluded invalid prices: {invalid}, above this budget: {unaffordable}.
No preview rewards could be generated.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.NoPreset: Create at least one preset before sending a Wildharvest scene to players.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.NoPlayer: No linked player characters are available for a test roll.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.NoDescri: No player-facing description has been written for this preset yet.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.Response: Watch which players joined, skipped or already completed the current scene.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.SceneHis: Switch between recently sent Wildharvest scenes.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.WaitingS: Waiting for player response or roll.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.JoinedWa: Player joined the scene and has not finished the roll yet.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.CloseSce: Close the Wildharvest scene "{sessionName}"? Pending players will no longer be able to answer or roll for it.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.Reminder: Wildharvest reminder sent to pending players.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.PresetsH: Reusable activity presets with skill checks, descriptions and attached compendium pools.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.PresetRe: This preset is ready to send.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.ExportCo: Copy this JSON backup if you want to move or restore the module configuration later.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.ImportCo: Paste a previously exported Wildharvest config JSON here. Existing presets, loot pools, rules, and fallback compendium settings will be replaced.
Paste the exported Wildharvest config JSON here...
Importing this backup will replace the current presets, loot pools, rules, and fallback compendium settings. Continue?
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.PresetSe: Search by name, description, skill or compendium...
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.NoPreset: No presets match the current search.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.DeletePr: Delete the preset "{presetName}"? This removes it from the saved Wildharvest presets.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.HistoryH: Review the latest searches stored on each character.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.HistoryS: Search by activity, location, skill or found rewards...
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.HistoryE: No saved searches match the current history filter.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.ControlPanel.HistoryN: Select a history entry to inspect its result and rewards.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Offer.Title: Wildharvest: send to players
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Offer.Description: Choose the activity that should be sent to the players as a decision.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Offer.Prompt: The GM is starting a Wildharvest scene. Do you want to take part?
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Offer.PlayerDescripti: Choose a different location and activity for each selected player.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Offer.ScenePrompt: The area is ready for a search. Join in if you want to gather from this scene.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Result.Title: Search Complete
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Result.NoItems: No items were found this time.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Result.NoActor: The result was not saved because no character was selected.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Result.InventoryAll: All items were added to your inventory.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Result.InventoryParti: Some items were added to your inventory. The rest stayed in the module fallback store.
Some items were added to {containerName}. The rest stayed in the module fallback store.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Result.InventoryFallb: Could not store the rewards in the inventory. They were saved in the module fallback store for {actorName}.
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Responses.Title: Wildharvest: responses
WILDHARVEST.Dialog.Responses.Empty: No search requests have been sent in this session yet.
WILDHARVEST.Result.NoLoot: You fail to uncover anything useful.
WILDHARVEST.Result.SomeLoot: You manage to pull a few useful finds from the area.
WILDHARVEST.Result.GoodLoot: You turn up a solid haul.
WILDHARVEST.Result.RichLoot: You strike an unusually rich haul.
WILDHARVEST.Preview.CompendiumRequired: Choose at least one item compendium in Configure before running a search.
WILDHARVEST.Preview.LootPointsMode: Loot is always generated from the active compendium pool using item rarity.
WILDHARVEST.Preview.LootPointsBudget: The total roll becomes Loot Points, then rarity is bought from that budget.
WILDHARVEST.Table.Name: Name
WILDHARVEST.Resources.NoActor: No available character to inspect resources.
WILDHARVEST.Resources.NoResources: This character has no stored resources yet.
WILDHARVEST.Logs.Empty: No logs yet for this character.
WILDHARVEST.Logs.LatestTen: Showing the 10 latest searches for this character.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ResolutionRequ: Wildharvest: the request was sent to the GM for resolution.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.PlayerResultRe: Wildharvest complete. The result window is ready.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.PlayerResultUn: Wildharvest completed and any rewards were granted, but the result panel could not be synchronized. The GM can inspect the result in Responses.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.HistorySaveFai: Wildharvest granted the result, but could not save it to the character history after several attempts.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.InterruptedRes: Wildharvest recovered interrupted resolutions: {recovered} completed from Actor history, {failed} marked failed without retrying rewards.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ResolutionReje: Wildharvest: the GM rejected this request because the offer is invalid, closed, or already used.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.NoActors: Wildharvest: no available character was found.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.GmOnlyConfig: Wildharvest: only the GM can edit the location configuration.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.GmOnlyOffer: Wildharvest: only the GM can send search offers.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ActiveGmOnly: Wildharvest: only the currently active GM can manage search sessions.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.NoActiveGm: Wildharvest: no active GM is available to resolve this offer.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.NoPlayers: Wildharvest: there are no active players to receive the offer.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.NoTargets: Wildharvest: choose at least one player to receive the offer.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.OfferSent: Wildharvest: a choice dialog was sent to the players.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.InvalidOffer: Wildharvest: the GM sent an invalid offer.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.JsonFormatFail: Wildharvest: the JSON cannot be formatted because it is invalid.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ConfigInvalid: Wildharvest: the location or loot pool JSON is invalid. The GM must fix it.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.RulesConfigInv: Wildharvest: the loot rule configuration is invalid. Default rules were loaded instead.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.RulesSaved: Wildharvest: the loot rules were saved.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.RulesResetPrev: Wildharvest: the form was reset to the default loot rules. Save to apply them.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.LogsClearFaile: Wildharvest: logs could not be cleared for {actorName}.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ActionFailed: Wildharvest: the action could not be resolved.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.SceneAlreadyCl: Wildharvest: this scene is already closed.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.SceneClosedByG: Wildharvest: the GM closed this scene.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ReminderBlocke: Wildharvest: you cannot send a reminder for a closed scene.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ConfigSaveFail: Wildharvest: the configuration could not be saved.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ConfigImported: Wildharvest: the configuration import was completed.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.ConfigImportFa: Wildharvest: the configuration import could not be completed.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.RandomLootPack: Wildharvest: the random loot compendium was saved.
Wildharvest: the random loot compendium selection was cleared.
Wildharvest: the random loot compendium pool was saved.
Wildharvest: the random loot compendium pool was cleared.
WILDHARVEST.Notifications.LanguageChange: Wildharvest: reopen dialogs to apply the selected module language everywhere.

WILDHARVEST.Errors.ActivitySkillRequired: Choose a skill for this search option.
WILDHARVEST.Errors.ActivityCompendiumsRe: Choose at least one item compendium for this search option.
WILDHARVEST.Errors.LootPoolNameRequiredS: The loot pool needs a name.
WILDHARVEST.Errors.LootPoolPacksRequired: Loot pool "{name}" must define at least one compendium in "packIds".

WILDHARVEST.Errors.ValueBracketInvalid: Invalid GP value rule at position {index}.

WILDHARVEST.Errors.ValueToleranceInvalid: The GP value tolerance must be between 0 and 100 percent.
WILDHARVEST.Errors.ValueBracketsRequired: At least one GP value rule is required.
WILDHARVEST.Errors.ValueBracketDuplicate: The GP value for {lootPoints} Loot Points is defined more than once.

WILDHARVEST.Errors.LootPointZeroRequired: At least one Loot Point threshold must grant 0 points.
WILDHARVEST.Errors.RarityRuleCostInvalid: Rarity rule "{id}" must define a positive point cost.

WILDHARVEST.Errors.ActivityDuplicateId: Activity id "{id}" is defined more than once.
